SOMOS.MENSAJE_1: We are a School Supervision team that coordinates, organizes, and evaluates academic and administrative actions.
SOMOS.MENSAJE_2: We promote collaborative work based on universal values, with ongoing communication and systematic support.

APRENDIZAJE.MENSAJE_1: In this School Supervision, we cultivate learning with heart, promoting collaboration, creativity, and respect in every step we take together.
APRENDIZAJE.MENSAJE_2: Every teacher, every family, every child is part of this story... a story we create day by day with joy, commitment, and values that unite us.

MANITAS.MENSAJE_1: Enthusiastic Little Hands that create, feel, and discover...
MANITAS.MENSAJE_2: Each stroke, each shape is a story told from the heart.
MANITAS.MENSAJE_3: These curious little hands transform the world with tenderness and color, through games, smiles, and small great steps.
MANITAS.MAGIA: Explore, imagine, create... hands are the bridge to the magic of learning.

INICIO.MENSAJE_1: In this School Supervision, we cultivate learning with heart, promoting collaboration, creativity, and respect in every step we take together.
INICIO.MENSAJE_2: Every teacher, every family, every child is part of this story... a story we create day by day with joy, commitment, and values that unite us.

COMUNIDAD.MENSAJE_1: We are an inspiring community—every gesture, every look, every word plants values that bloom with joy and respect.
COMUNIDAD.MENSAJE_2: Families, teachers, and children build each day a space full of creativity, emotions, and small great achievements.

DOCENTES.MENSAJE_1: Star teachers who inspire with every curious glance, who plant a seed and sow knowledge, creativity, and respect in every shared story.
DOCENTES.MENSAJE_2: They are the ones who turn the ordinary into the extraordinary, who embrace dreams and turn them into discoveries. Teachings full of joy, commitment, and a beautiful vocation.
DOCENTES.MAGIA: In our educational community, every teacher is a beacon of light guiding the journey of our little explorers.
